name: Creole Tomato Bread ABM
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Red bell pepper, fine chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a moderate temperature.
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Place the mixture into a bread pan and select white bread setting on your bread machine.
4. Press start to begin baking.
5. Once the cycle is complete, carefully remove the bread from the pan and allow it to cool.
6. Serve this colorful, nutritious bread with confidence, knowing that Basin Street's spirit shines through in every bite.
